title: [I/A] Marvel Battle Lines 決戰前線(1) 經期女俠大戰奇妙博士

replies.msg:
MARVEL BATTLE LINES:
簡介: 卡牌對戰遊戲類, 含過三關、戰棋元素


官網: https://www.marvelbattlelines.com/n-launch

唔撚洗首抽, 無一張卡係屈機到完全需要靠呢張卡先玩到, 另一方面一張卡勁都需要成副牌組配合, 跟本無可能抽哂成副牌。

另外呢隻GAME算好佛心, 送好多鑽石,你玩哂啲模式基本上都會送好多牌比你。課唔課都唔會影響好大，因為卡牌組合有限制，唔係落哂勁既卡就等於贏，要配合牌組就需要取捨

如果小課建議課升級包78蚊 其他無咩特別就唔好課了 (一定要係30LV之前先買到, 30LV之後就無得買)

玩法:
1) 每人有四張卡起手, 每副牌組有12張牌, 有兩種類別既牌 分別係動作牌(魔法卡) 同埋角色牌
2) 每張牌既右上角會有能量費用顯示, 表示你需要幾多能量先可以召佢上場, 每副牌組必定要放3張0費既角色卡 其他不限, 而能量就係每回合隨機生成係場地上面
3) 場地係3X4格仔, 每回合可以出「無限」張動作卡, 但係只要你一召喚角色或者移動角色 就會視為結束回合
4) 角色卡有唔同既能力, 無法詳講, 主要都係「每回合疊血疊攻」、「向某方向造成傷害」、「變身」、「每回合造成隨機傷害」.....仲有好多
5) 點先可以贏? 就係需要過三關, 必定係打橫三/斜三/直四 記得打直唔可以三個


**注意, 動作牌只能用一次(除了用黃蜂女主戰者可以25%機會回收之外)
而角色牌死左之後會番番你牌組入面, 之後你換牌可以換番佢出黎
換牌係好易換中 因為得12張牌

牌組建議:
3張0費(必定), 3張動作牌, 3張1費,[ 2張2費, 1張3費 ] / [ 3張2費]
至於點先為之勁既牌組就下面討論 因為大家抽既牌都唔同 好難一概而論, 而且有好多都類近功能但又唔完全一樣既牌 所以都係大家分享下

總而言之
0費作用係搶能量搶資源 唔好拎黎頂人地 因為太低血 一下就比人秒
3張動作牌係要做到單清 群清 有一張必須就係收集能量
1費作用係用低費解對面站場角色 同埋搶資源
而2費3費係你牌組既核心牌, 因為主要係靠2費3費黎收對手皮


如果一張卡除左可以做到以上既功能, 再外加少少壓力比對手 就係一張好既牌 例如drex she hulk 呢兩隻高血, 除左2費係殺著之外, 每回合都會疊攻疊血, 對手唔理佢就會愈疊愈大隻 唔解唔得


又例如經期女俠 高血到用鷹眼2費單解都射唔死 浪費人地大量既資源去解佢 唔解佢 佢一移動又會變雙倍攻 一連線基本上一個都

聽日有更新

◈ Maintenance Period:
11/20(TUE) 01:00 - 13:00 (UTC+0) [3 hours]
◈ Effect: The game will NOT be available.
===========================================================================

1. Card Balancing
・Some cards will be adjusted.
・No cards will be available for disintegration for this rebalance.



2. Increasing Maximum level limit
・ The Maximum user level will be increased from 30 to 40
・ After the 11/20 update, remaining extra EXP will be converted to normal EXP.
・ If your extra EXP is at 100%, you will become level 31 after the update and no card will be rewarded. If you want to convert EXP to a card, please do so before the update.

3. Added new CAMPAIGN chapters
・Adding two new Campaign chapter 4 and 5
・Seal the portal opened by the Wands of Watoomb with your Super Heroes.

4. Battle
・ Skip turn button appearance has been changed
- Before: When the player does not have any usable cards, movable characters on the field, and has switched all cards in their hand, the skip button will appear.
- After: When the player doesn’t have any usable cards in hand or any moveable characters on the field, the skip button will now appear.
・ Changed the duration of the PvP turn timer
- Turn timer has been reduced from 60 seconds to 50 seconds
- If a player doesn’t take any action for a turn (50 seconds), next turn timer will be reduced from 50 sec to 30sec and to 10 sec and so forth.
- When a player takes an action again, it will be reset to 50 sec.

5. Added new SPECIAL OPS chapters
・ SPECIAL OPS Chapter 5, 6, 7, and 8 (NORMAL and HARD modes) has been added

6. Misc. Improvements
・ Default card sorting option changed from Alphabetical to Rarity.
・ The last sort by and filter options in MY DECK will be saved
・ Players can now upgrade cards in the SPECIAL OPS rewards screen.
・ Event quests now show the quest progression
・ Added new graphics options: Battery saving mode, Standard, and High Quality. After the 11/20 update, Standard will be the default for every player.
・ Added the “Minion” family to the CARD COLLECTION section
・ Repeat rewards will be added to CAMPAIGN MODE stages.

7. Bug Fixes
・ If the CHALLENGE season finishes while playing CHALLENGE mode, the player will be moved to the MAIN menu
・ Fixed a crash bug related to moving Agamotto with 1 HP
・ Minor translation changes

[Notice]Update patch note [12/20]

[Update Maintenance Announcement]
■ Maintenance Date: Thursday, December 20th
■ Maintenance Effect: The game will be unavailable while it undergoes maintenance.

[Update Content]


1. Card Upgrade EXP Added
• You can now earn EXP for upgrading cards.


[EXP earned for upgrading cards]

You will receive some EXP for any cards upgraded before the new card upgrade EXP system is implemented on Thu 12/20. Please check your mailbox.


2. New Card Added
• 'Thanos (Infinity Gauntlet/Character Card)' has entered the world of MARVEL Battle Lines.
→ Check out new character cards in the Shop.



3. 16 Character & Action Cards Rebalanced
• Target cards: Tactical Retrieval, Dr. Strange, Squirrel Girl, Lost Power Source, Mental Subjugation, Death, Loki (Agents of Asgard), Purple Man, Sandman, Mysterio, Spider-Man, Star-Lord, Lizard, Dagger, Ant-Man (Scott Lang), Iron Man

*Cards whose stats were lowered by this update can be disintegrated
by going to [Notices] from after maintenance on 12/20 - Wed 1/2.
Available for Disintegration: Tactical Retrieval, Dr. Strange, Squirrel Girl, Lost Power Source, Mental Subjugation, Death


4. Card Upgrade Method Improved
• You can now use particles to upgrade cards as soon as they're obtained from a card pack.



5. Daily Mission Level Achievement Reward Added
• Rewards for reaching specific levels have been added to Daily Missions.



6. Trial Simulations Improvements
• 2 Cosmic Shards will appear on the battlefield during the opponent's first turn
• If you're charged during Trials 4 and 5, your stats will not be reduced. Also, you will counterattack when attacked.
• More gold will be rewarded for clearing Trials
* Trial changes may be applied to Challenge or Arena in future updates.


7. Arena Mode Improvements
• Chain victory bonuses can now be obtained up to Arena 8
• The Arena's matchmaking pool has been expanded.
• Issue where players are matched with the same player twice in a row has been fixed.


8. New Events Added
• Check in to the to earn '100 Gems.'
• Take Out the Trash & Leader Team-Up
• Card Support
* Log in after the update to obtain a Premium Card Pack (Entire Collection).
Please see event notifications for more details.


9. Display and UI Modified
• Descriptions of handicaps given as the player achieves multiple victories added

• Thanos card's Battle Line attack animation improved
• Battle screen display of some characters improved
• Leader's effect display direction improved
